failure_movement.justification: Prediction claimed passrate +0.05–0.07 (to 0.69–0.71); actual was -0.03 (to 0.61). Persistent-fail direction inverted: correct cluster fell 64→61 not rose. However, all 3 specifically named tasks (8cf51dda, 07741c44, 099778bb) did flip fail→pass as predicted. Wrong/empty roughly flat (10→11, 3→2) as predicted. Partial credit for named tasks and flat wrong/empty.

trace_movement.justification: Prediction claimed prompt tokens would stay near iter_016's ~1807; actual was 1592.6 (similar to iter018's 1558.5, not near 1807). 8cf51dda retrieved objectives list and passed, consistent with list-block context claim. Completion tokens stayed flat (224→220) as implied. Overall: one wrong specific claim, one directionally supported, one confirmed.

side_effects.justification: Prediction warned token bloat risk if bounding loosens; prompt tokens rose modestly +34 (not severe). Warned list-block misfiring on non-list sequences — plausible given unknown cluster grew 23→26 and 8 tasks newly regressed. Main actual regression (net -3 passrate) was not flagged as a risk. Partial credit for the misfiring warning that may explain unknown cluster growth.
